value.found_quote: ChatGPT — Get answers. Find inspiration. Be more productive. Now with GPT-5.5, our most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's ChatGPT overview, extensively describing ChatGPT as a currently available product with multiple pricing tiers (Free, Go, Plus, Pro) and features, confirming OpenAI offers ChatGPT.
